Discussed and PETITIONER MANDEVILLA CIRCLE, LLC'S Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights is taken off calendar with right to re-file. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.

Ntc Of Hearing On Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlewment Payment Rights

Julie D. Noe, Esq., of the Law Offices of Julie D. Noe, Tel. 702.685.2775, appearing for Petitioner and moving party via court call.

The matter was argued. The court vacated its tentative ruling.
